summary: Tests cover main requirements (retention policies, dry-run, deletion plan summary, error handling) but have significant gaps: ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 is solid for unit testing, but Run-ActTests.ps1 only exercises 3 cases (budget-constrained), tests only MaxAgeDays and KeepLatestPerWorkflow policies in act (not MaxTotalSizeBytes), and all act tests use dry-run mode—actual deletion and error paths never execute through the workflow. Missing edge case coverage: zero/negative policy values, tie-breaking for same-timestamp artifacts, special characters in names, very large numbers, policy interaction (only 1 case tests multiple policies), and complete workflow configuration validation (shell: pwsh, permissions, environment variables not checked). Design is well-structured with clear separation (unit/integration/structural tests) and good helpers, but fixture complexity is limited. Would catch regressions in happy paths but miss important boundary conditions and integration failures.
